'''damuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olds|olds]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olds|olds]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmiwith|dæmiwith]] || [[word:dæmiwij|dæmiwij]] || [[word:dæmiwish|dæmiwish]] || [[word:dæmiwi|dæmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumuwuth|damumuwuth]] || [[word:damumuwuj|damumuwuj]] || [[word:damumuwush|damumuwush]] || [[word:damumuwu|damumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damuwuth|damuwuth]] || [[word:damuwuj|damuwuj]] || [[word:damuwush|damuwush]] || [[word:damuwu|damuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufwuth|damufwuth]] || [[word:damufwuj|damufwuj]] || [[word:damufwush|damufwush]] || [[word:damufwuf|damufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damuwuthu|damuwuthu]] || [[word:damuwuju|damuwuju]] || [[word:damuwushu|damuwushu]] || [[word:damuwuku|damuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damuwuth|damuwuth]] || [[word:damuwuj|damuwuj]] || [[word:damuwush|damuwush]] || [[word:damuwu|damuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damuwuthul|damuwuthul]] || [[word:damuwujul|damuwujul]] || [[word:damuwushul|damuwushul]] || [[word:damuwukul|damuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damuwuthuthu|damuwuthuthu]] || [[word:damuwujuju|damuwujuju]] || [[word:damuwushushu|damuwushushu]] || [[word:damuwuku|damuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damuwuthun|damuwuthun]] || [[word:damuwujun|damuwujun]] || [[word:damuwushun|damuwushun]] || [[word:damuwukun|damuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damuwuthuoro|damuwuthuoro]] || [[word:damuwujuoro|damuwujuoro]] || [[word:damuwushuoro|damuwushuoro]] || [[word:damuwukuoro|damuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
